testcase.classname: CI/CD Gate Demonstration should deliberately fail when shouldFail is true
testcase.name: CI/CD Gate Demonstration should deliberately fail when shouldFail is true

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions add should add two positive numbers correctly
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions add should add two positive numbers correctly

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions add should handle negative numbers correctly
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions add should handle negative numbers correctly

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions add should handle floating point precision correctly
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions add should handle floating point precision correctly

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions subtract should subtract two numbers correctly
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions subtract should subtract two numbers correctly

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions subtract should handle subtraction resulting in float values
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions subtract should handle subtraction resulting in float values

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions multiply should multiply two numbers correctly
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions multiply should multiply two numbers correctly

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions multiply should handle multiplying floating point numbers
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions multiply should handle multiplying floating point numbers

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions divide should divide two numbers correctly
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions divide should divide two numbers correctly

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions divide should divide zero by any non-zero number
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions divide should divide zero by any non-zero number

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions divide should handle division by a negative number
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions divide should handle division by a negative number

testcase.classname: Math Utility Functions divide should throw an error when dividing by zero
testcase.name: Math Utility Functions divide should throw an error when dividing by zero

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests GET / (Status/Health Check) should return 200 OK with healthy status and metadata
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests GET / (Status/Health Check) should return 200 OK with healthy status and metadata

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully add two numbers
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully add two numbers

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully divide two numbers
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully divide two numbers

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully subtract two numbers
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully subtract two numbers

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully multiply two numbers
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should successfully multiply two numbers

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when parameters are missing
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when parameters are missing

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when parameters are not numbers
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when parameters are not numbers

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when operator is invalid
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when operator is invalid

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 422 when attempting to divide by zero
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 422 when attempting to divide by zero

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when JSON payload is malformed
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should return 400 when JSON payload is malformed

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should pass non-syntax errors (like content encoding errors) to next(err)
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests POST /api/calculate should pass non-syntax errors (like content encoding errors) to next(err)

testcase.classname: Express API Integration Tests 404 Route Handler should return 404 for undefined routes
testcase.name: Express API Integration Tests 404 Route Handler should return 404 for undefined routes
